title: Greek Food - A Farmer's Delight Addon
description: Adds popular Greek like souvlaki or other popular foods like kebab and others...
body:
This is a mod that adds many popular Greek foods. Mostly Greek Souvlaki but i am planning on also adding more and more as the time passes (if your request a food i can add it, if it fits in the theme).

### **REQUIRES CROPTOPIA**
[Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia)

# All the current foods:

![All the foods1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f61f8631dbdf1ce5491a66d67d05831fc0a701c2.png)
![All the foods2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91c64073d442db949cfebb2d448a1791238bbb5d.png)

❌ = Not supported
✅ = supported
